samples.label: Path A — defective batch policy question

submission.subject: Defective batch B-2026-0117 against PO-2026-892 — return / replacement policy?
submission.description: Hi QA team, batch B-2026-0117 of cold-rolled steel sheets supplied against PO-2026-892 has shown thickness variance beyond the +/- 0.05 mm tolerance on 23 of 500 units inspected. Could you confirm the formal NCR (non-conformance report) workflow on the portal, the photographs / inspection-report format, and whether replacement vs credit memo is at our discretion under the SILVER-tier contract?

samples.label: Path B — recurring quality complaint (no specific KB hit)

submission.subject: Recurring rust on inbound steel sheets across last 3 dispatches
submission.description: Across our last three dispatches (DC-2026-9921, DC-2026-9978, DC-2026-10011) we have observed surface rust on roughly 4-6% of the units, all from the same supplier facility. We suspect the protective oil coating is being skipped during loading. Could quality-assurance investigate at source, share root-cause findings, and propose a corrective-action plan for the next two months of dispatches?
